title: Design autonomous claim loop protocol
description: Design the autonomous claim loop protocol in MAP_System/artifacts/planning/autonomous-claim-loop.md. Specifies how an agent process polls the runner, auto-claims the next ready task via db/claims.py, sends heartbeats, submits on completion, and handles claim failures. Intended as the spec for a future TASK-021 implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Defines the poll-claim-work-heartbeat-submit cycle with decision points
Specifies failure modes: claim race, heartbeat timeout, max_attempts exhausted
Specifies how the loop interacts with expire_leases (reconcile.py) and the runner
Defines a safe shutdown protocol (finish current task, do not abandon mid-work)
Pseudocode or flowchart illustrates the full loop
